body:
## Summary
- add a focused `--focus-remove-ads-hook-parity` validator path for Remove Ads entitlement hook checks
- guard E2E-only mock-owned Remove Ads runtime behavior, native runtime provider wiring, and normal web fallback behavior
- include the dedicated web E2E mock-owned runtime harness in `npm run test:monetization` and share the TypeScript runtime loader

## Validation
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-remove-ads-hook-parity`
- `node --test tests/content-remove-ads-hook-parity.test.js scripts/monetization.test.js --test-name-pattern "Remove Ads entitlement hook|mock owned|E2E|createDefaultPurchaseRuntimeOptions|stored entitlement"`
- `npm run test:monetization`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/profile-remove-ads-pending.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: test: guard Remove Ads E2E mock ownership
